summary: Classified the five open PRs in this live inventory shard independently. No shared canonical was chosen, no security-sensitive signal was present, and no close, merge, fix, or PR-opening action is safe under this job's permissions. Each item needs maintainer review or technical judgment rather than backlog cleanup.

Needs maintainer technical judgment because it is an open contributor PR with active author follow-up and a failing proof check; closure, merge, and fix actions are disabled.
